title: 2024年度 第3回検定一次試験 英検4級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let's play in the park tomorrow.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What time shall we meet?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何時に会う？」に1の「10時頃」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「10時頃」→正解。2「7ドル」→時間でない。3「6日間」→時間でない。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, how much is this shirt?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you have any shirts on sale?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「セールのシャツある？」に1の「はい、あちらに」が適切。
highlights: Do you have any shirts on sale
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「はい、あちらに」→正解。2「それは私のです」→無関係。3「元気です」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Your bag looks heavy.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It is.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Shall I carry it for you?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「持ちましょうか？」に1の「大丈夫、自分でできる」が適切。
highlights: Shall I carry it for you
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「自分でできる」→正解。2「ポケットにある」→無関係。3「好きじゃなかった」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I caught a fish.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Great. Let's cook it for dinner.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What should we eat with it?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何と一緒に食べる？」に2の「ご飯とサラダ」が適切。
highlights: What should we eat with it
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「釣り好きじゃない」→無関係。2「ご飯とサラダ」→正解。3「昼食後」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: You use chopsticks well.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: When did you start using them?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: When I was two years old.
questions.explanation: 「いつ使い始めた？」に3の「2歳の時」が適切。
highlights: When did you start using them
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「とても古かった」→いつかの答えでない。2「もっとほしい」→無関係。3「2歳の時」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you play tennis?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, I do.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Who do you play with?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「誰とテニスする？」に3の「叔父と」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「昨日見た」→誰とかの答えでない。2「できない」→やると言っている。3「叔父と」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can we walk to the park?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. But there's also a bus.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you want to take the bus?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「バスに乗る？」に1の「いいえ、歩こう」が適切。
highlights: Do you want to take the bus
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「歩こう」→正解。2「10ある」→無関係。3「はい、した」→過去形。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Will Ms. Jones come to our meeting?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, she won't.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: When can I see her?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「いつ会える？」に2の「休暇の後」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「3日前」→未来を聞いている。2「休暇後」→正解。3「はじめまして」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let's visit Grandpa tomorrow.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can I bring my camera?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Why?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「なぜ？」に3の「おじいちゃんの写真を撮るため」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「私の電話じゃない」→無関係。2「電車に乗ろう」→理由でない。3「写真を撮るため」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Are these books for sale?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, they're free.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can I take some?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「もらっていい？」に1の「1冊どうぞ」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1冊どうぞ」→正解。2「ありません」→無料と言った。3「物語を書く」→無関係。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Where were you yesterday?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I went to the doctor. What did you do in English class?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: We sang some songs.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That sounds fun.

questions.question: What did the girl do yesterday?
questions.explanation: 「医者に行った」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「医者に行った」→正解。2「学校に行った」→医者。3「歌のレッスン」→言及なし。4「ラジオを聞いた」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You weren't in class yesterday, Mark.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I had a cold, Ms. Stevens.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you feel better today?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, thank you.

questions.question: What happened to Mark yesterday?
questions.explanation: 「風邪をひいた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「宿題しなかった」→風邪。2「かばんをなくした」→風邪。3「風邪をひいた」→正解。4「成績が悪い」→風邪。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Will you buy white basketball shoes?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, I'll get red ones.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is your team's uniform red, too?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, it's blue and gold.

questions.question: What color shoes is the girl going to buy?
questions.explanation: 「赤いのを買う」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「白」→否定。2「赤」→正解。3「青」→ユニフォーム。4「金」→ユニフォーム。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me. How much is this blue skirt?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Forty dollars.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That's expensive. How about this yellow and green one?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's twenty dollars.

questions.question: Which skirt is $40?
questions.explanation: 「青いスカートは40ドル」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「青」→正解。2「黄色」→20ドル。3「緑」→20ドル。4「ピンク」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh no!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What's wrong, Mary?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It's raining, and I don't have an umbrella.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'll take you to the train station.

questions.question: What is Mary's problem?
choices: She is late for a meeting.
questions.explanation: 「傘がない」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「切符をなくした」→傘。2「傘がない」→正解。3「会議に遅れる」→傘。4「駅が見つからない」→傘。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How much is the salad?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It's $5.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK. I'll have a salad and two bottles of water.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That will be $6, please.

questions.question: How much is the salad?
questions.explanation: 「サラダは5ドル」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「2ドル」→5ドル。2「5ドル」→正解。3「6ドル」→合計。4「7ドル」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's seven o'clock. Let's go home.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Will you walk?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No. I'll take a taxi. How about you?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'll take a train.

questions.question: How will the man get home?
questions.explanation: 「タクシーに乗る」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「電車」→女性。2「歩く」→否定。3「タクシー」→正解。4「バス」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I forgot my pencil, and we have a test today.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I have another pencil. You can use it.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thanks!

questions.question: Why was the girl worried?
choices: She didn't study for a test.
questions.explanation: 「鉛筆を忘れた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「宿題しなかった」→鉛筆。2「テスト勉強しなかった」→鉛筆。3「鉛筆忘れた」→正解。4「寝坊した」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is our new English teacher from Australia?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No. She's from New Zealand.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Oh. You went there last year, right?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I went to America.

questions.question: Where is their teacher from?
questions.explanation: 「ニュージーランド出身」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「アメリカ」→女の子が行った。2「イギリス」→言及なし。3「オーストラリア」→否定。4「ニュージーランド」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, let's have curry for dinner!

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No. We ate that yesterday. Do you want noodles instead?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I don't really like noodles. I want pizza!

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK.

questions.question: What will they have for dinner?
questions.explanation: 「ピザが食べたい」「OK」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「カレー」→昨日食べた。2「ヌードル」→好きじゃない。3「肉」→言及なし。4「ピザ」→正解。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Alice will play in a piano concert next Sunday. Alice is happy because her mother bought her a new dress to wear on stage.

questions.question: What will Alice do next Sunday?
questions.explanation: 「来週の日曜にピアノコンサートで演奏する」。
highlights: play in a piano concert next Sunday
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「新しい服を買う」→母が買った。2「コンサートで演奏」→正解。3「母を手伝う」→言及なし。4「ピアノレッスン」→コンサート。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Shelly had a bad headache yesterday, so she stayed at home. This morning, she felt better, so she could go to work.

questions.question: Why did Shelly stay at home yesterday?
questions.explanation: 「ひどい頭痛だった」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「腹痛」→頭痛。2「頭痛」→正解。3「オフィスが閉まった」→頭痛。4「天気が悪い」→頭痛。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Anna likes camping. Last weekend, she went camping with some friends. She was sad because the weather was cloudy, and she couldn't see the moon or the stars.

questions.question: What did Anna do on the weekend?
choices: She went to her friend's house.
questions.explanation: 「キャンプに行った」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「月を見た」→見えなかった。2「キャンプに行った」→正解。3「映画スターに会った」→stars＝星。4「友達の家に行った」→キャンプ。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Last summer, I went to India. I liked the food very much, and I enjoyed learning about Indian culture. Now, I want to study about India in college.

questions.question: What is the man talking about?
questions.explanation: 「インドへの旅行」について話している。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「学校」→旅行。2「好きな食べ物」→旅行全体。3「好きな科目」→大学で勉強したい。4「旅行」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I like the color red. I have many red shirts and shoes. This weekend, I'll go shopping and get a red bag.

questions.question: What is the girl talking about?
questions.explanation: 「赤が好き」→好きな色について。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「好きな色」→正解。2「新しいモール」→買い物に行く。3「新しい靴」→赤い服や靴。4「休暇」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I want to fly to Spain this summer, but the ticket is $2,000. That's too expensive. I should fly to London. It's only $1,500.

questions.question: How much is the ticket to Spain?
questions.explanation: 「スペイン行きのチケットは2,000ドル」。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm sad because my sister broke her arm. She went to the doctor last week. She will stay home this weekend.

questions.question: Why is the boy sad?
choices: He had to stay at home.
questions.explanation: 「姉/妹が腕を骨折した」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「家にいなければ」→姉妹が家にいる。2「姉妹が骨折」→正解。3「風邪をひいた」→骨折。4「姉妹が負けた」→骨折。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I often eat Chinese food on the weekend. Last weekend, I went to a Mexican restaurant. It was delicious. Next Saturday, I want to eat at an American restaurant.

questions.question: Where does the man want to eat next Saturday?
questions.explanation: 「来週の土曜はアメリカンレストランで食べたい」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「アメリカン」→正解。2「中華」→よく食べる。3「日本料理」→言及なし。4「メキシカン」→先週末。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My family likes music. I play the violin, and my brother plays the drums. Our parents both play the guitar. I also want to learn the piano.

questions.question: What does the girl play?
questions.explanation: 「バイオリンを弾く」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ギター」→両親。2「バイオリン」→正解。3「ドラム」→兄弟。4「ピアノ」→習いたい。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I missed the 9:00 a.m. train to Tokyo, so I had to take the 9:30 a.m. train. However, I wasn't late for my soccer practice at 11:00 a.m.

questions.question: What time did the man take the train?
questions.explanation: 「9:30の電車に乗った」。
